title: Simple Enchantments +
description: Adds New Simple Enchantments To The Game
body:
**Adds New Simple Enchantments**
#
- **Speed – Increases movement speed**

- **Attack Speed – Increases the attack speed of weapons**

- **Poison – Inflicts poison**

- **Max Health – Increases maximum health**

- **Unbreakable - Makes the item unbreakable**
